git_ref_policy: Use git rev-parse HEAD/origin/main for moving SHAs; this file does not track branch head commits.
purpose: Minimal machine-readable current context and routing for agents.

read_policy.history_read_condition: Only read archive/logs when explicitly asked for history, debugging a repeated known error, regression archaeology, or old audit details.

progress.current_focus: Product-wide observability/statistics V2 implementation is complete locally: product-wide metrics, reports, alerts, synthetics, exact scheduled active-user aggregates, sanitized traces and trace-aware logging are in place.

vk_bot_video_mode.summary: VK video model picker exposes PrunaAI and Back. PrunaAI stores peer-scoped video mode; the next plain text creates a video_generate Job through worker/provider flow. Stale Sora/Kling/Seedance/Haiuo payloads fall back to Show Menu and do not create Jobs. VK video delivery supports VK_VIDEO_DELIVERY_MODE=doc for mp4 file attachments and VK_VIDEO_DELIVERY_MODE=video for native VK video attachments through VK_VIDEO_ACCESS_TOKEN.
vk_bot_video_mode.provider_boundary: VK handler creates Jobs only; video providers are called by cmd/worker through internal/adapter/provider.

current_priorities: keep protected Product Catalog Admin routes operator-only with safe DTOs and immutable payment intent snapshots
use https://neiirohub.ru/billing/webhooks/yookassa as the canonical payment webhook route unless superseded
keep payment credits granted only by provider-verified webhook/reconciliation ledger top-ups
keep 54-FZ receipt fields snapshotted on payment_intents for payment retries and manual refunds
keep production YooKassa webhooks HTTPS/proxy guarded and monitor webhook/refund rollback metrics
keep YooKassa payment.succeeded, payment.canceled and refund.succeeded smoke paths covered through public webhook delivery and idempotent replay checks

provider-webhook readiness exposes payment webhook backlog count and oldest unprocessed age
payment metrics expose webhook backlog, processing errors and payment provider error counters
Prometheus rules include stale webhook backlog, provider errors and provider-webhook readiness alerts
manual refund API rejects unknown amount, partial and automatic fields instead of silently treating partial refund attempts as full refunds
provider refund responses must match the full payment amount and currency or the internal refund debit is compensated and the refund is marked failed
partial and automatic refunds remain blocked until lot/FIFO attribution exists
followups: leave pending failed checkout intents unpaid until provider success/cancel/expiration is verified
last_yookassa_smoke.secret_policy: No YooKassa secrets, ADMIN_TOKEN, launch params, auth headers or raw provider payloads were recorded.

active_runtime.local_env_note: _env is the supported macOS workspace fallback for local secrets; it is ignored by Git and must not be logged.

docs_compaction.policy: Keep active docs short and current; use docs/archive/** only for historical investigation or explicitly requested archaeology.

doc_update_policy.routine_task: Do not update docs or logs.
update_error_log_when: a non-obvious error has a reusable root cause and fix
a repeated incident needs machine-readable prevention data

logs.policy: Only append sanitized error entries for reusable incidents. Do not log routine actions or context changes.

notes: Product statistics observability implementation is complete in the local repository and should be treated as current context.
The previous product_observability plan was complete and removed from .agents/plans to avoid stale active context.
Keep implementation local-repository first unless a later task explicitly asks for VPS or Cloudflare changes.
Do not log or commit secrets, prompts, full launch params, raw PII, raw provider payloads or raw payment payloads.

This is the next product-wide observability/statistics plan and covers VK Bot, VK Mini App, jobs, workers, providers, payments, billing, referrals, artifacts, admin/operator APIs and future website readiness.
Treat .agents/plans/product_statistics_observability.json as completed baseline context, not as the active implementation target.
Keep all observability endpoints private and never expose /metrics publicly.
Do not add high-cardinality metric labels such as user_id, vk_user_id, job_id, payment_id, artifact_id, referral_code, raw_error, raw_url, prompt or idempotency_key.
Do not log, trace, alert, report or dashboard secrets, prompts, full launch params, raw PII, raw provider payloads, raw payment payloads or private artifact URLs.
Do not run live YooKassa money actions or real provider-spend synthetics without separate explicit confirmation.

V2 implementation added bounded admin action metrics, exact scheduled active-user aggregate gauge, daily/weekly report specs, provider/worker/payment/security/referral alerts, synthetic runner refinements, sanitized trace error classes and trace-aware runtime logging.

archive.policy: Historical evidence only, not current instruction.

security_invariants: no secrets, full launch params, prompt bodies, private artifact URLs, raw PII or provider credentials in docs/logs
no provider calls from VK handlers or Mini App BFF
do not weaken auth, signature checks, moderation, billing or idempotency
